## Checklist

- [ ] I reviewed my own diff and removed unrelated changes, generated files, and debugging output.
- [ ] I tested the changed workflow and relevant failure paths in a disposable repository.
- [ ] I did not include credentials, private keys, passphrases, tokens, private repository data, or personal configuration.
- [ ] I preserved path validation, localhost restrictions, and safe Git argument handling where relevant.
- [ ] I added confirmation and Safety Net behavior for destructive actions where relevant.
- [ ] I updated the README or other documentation for user-visible changes.
- [ ] I included screenshots or recordings for user interface changes when practical.
- [ ] My contribution follows the Code of Conduct and contributing guidelines.
